examples:
Command Example
!bitdam-get-verdict idValue=68f009dc92a405d1015026e8e30e6d1598047124
Context Example
root:{} 4 items
BitDam:{} 2 items
Analysis:{} 3 items
ID:68f009dc92a405d1015026e8e30e6d1598047124
Status:DONE

!bitdam-get-verdict idValue=68f009dc92a405d1015026e8e30e6d1598047124
Context Example
root:{} 4 items
BitDam:{} 2 items
Analysis:{} 3 items
ID:68f009dc92a405d1015026e8e30e6d1598047124
Status:DONE
Verdict:CLEAN
name: bitdam-get-verdict

outputs.description: Status of the analysis ("DONE" or "IN_PROGRESS") BitDam.Analysis.Verdict Final verdict of the analysis ("Clean", "Malicious", or empty if the analysis is not finished.
outputs.name: BitDam.Analysis.Status

outputs.description: The DBot score DBotScore.Type The indicator type
outputs.name: DBotScore.Score

outputs.description: The DBot score vendor File.Malicious.Name File name
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor

outputs.description: For malicious files, the vendor that made the decision File.Malicious.Description For malicious files, the reason that the vendor made the decision
outputs.name: File.Malicious.Vendor
